metadata.purpose: Structured event log for JARVIS Phase 1 - enables queries, audit trails, and proactive context

projects.name: RAPID
projects.next_milestone: Ads live with first image creatives

projects.name: JARVIS
projects.next_milestone: Week 1 foundation complete (memory audit, logging, relational model)

decisions.title: Multi-Campaign Funnel Structure
decisions.context: $3,000/month budget, need to optimize CAC to $60-120 AUD, 25-50 sign-ups target
decisions.rationale: Separates cold/warm/testing audiences, allows different optimization strategies per funnel stage, better CAC control

decisions.title: Use Advantage Audience Instead of Specific Interests
decisions.context: Specific interests (Fashion Reps, Sneaker Culture, Luxury Brands) unavailable in Meta library. Needed immediate solution.
options: Use broad Advantage Audience (Meta optimizes, no manual constraints)
Use only lookalike audiences (risky for cold traffic)
decisions.rationale: Advantage Audience performs well on cold traffic; Meta's algorithm infers audience from behavior + geo. Fastest path to launch without losing performance.
decisions.reversibility: High - can add interests later if they become available
decisions.impact: Audience targeting less specific but faster optimization; wider age range (18-65 vs 18-45 target)

decisions.title: All RAPID Creatives Must Follow Strict Brand Guidelines
decisions.context: Created 10 image ad briefs and noticed inconsistent brand application in first draft. RAPID has distinct visual identity (black/white/blue, checkerboard, all-caps headlines)
decisions.chosen: Rewrite all creative briefs with explicit RAPID brand requirements (color palette, typography, signature elements, tone)
decisions.rationale: Strong brand consistency drives recognition and trust, especially for new marketplace. Brand identity is foundation for ads.
decisions.reversibility: Medium - can deviate later but not recommended

decisions.title: Phase 1 Focus: Memory Foundation Before Voice/Agency
decisions.context: JARVIS roadmap has 5 phases. Need to prioritize: Foundation (memory) is prerequisite for all others.
decisions.chosen: Phase 1 (Weeks 1-4): Memory audit, relational indexing, structured logging, cross-project mapping
decisions.rationale: Can't be proactive/autonomous without persistent memory. Foundation must be rock-solid before adding voice, agency, hardware.
decisions.reversibility: Low - this is foundational architecture decision

discoveries.title: Meta Interest Targeting Limitation - Specific Interests Unavailable
discoveries.description: When setting up RAPID ad sets, discovered that specific interests like 'Fashion Reps', 'Sneaker Culture', 'Supreme' etc. don't exist or aren't accessible in Meta's targeting library for this account.
discoveries.implication: Had to pivot to Advantage Audience approach; less precise but still effective
discoveries.source: Meta Ads API response during campaign setup
discoveries.action: Created decision log entry, implemented Advantage Audience fallback

discoveries.title: 25K-View Taobao Tutorial Video Can Be Adapted for RAPID
discoveries.description: Lachlan shared YouTube video 'HOW TO BUY FROM TAOBAO UPDATED 2026!' with 25K views from r/FashionReps-aligned creator. Video teaches Taobao buying process but can be completely reframed to position RAPID as the simpler solution.
discoveries.implication: Organic growth opportunity; could drive significant traffic if adapted properly
discoveries.action: Created RAPID_VIDEO_EDIT_SUGGESTIONS.md with timestamp-by-timestamp edit recommendations (8 major sections identified for change)
discoveries.opportunity_value: Estimated 5-10K monthly views if adapted correctly

discoveries.title: Session Memory Failure - Forgot RAPID Ads Work from Previous Session
discoveries.description: Lachlan reminded Negan this morning that entire RAPID ads campaign strategy was completed yesterday (May 14) but wasn't recalled at session start today. Had to be re-briefed on: 3-campaign funnel, targeting limitations, heartbeat protocol, image briefs.
discoveries.implication: Demonstrates exactly why JARVIS memory foundation is needed - session-based context isn't enough
discoveries.root_cause: No structured logging, no automatic context recall at session start, memory scattered across multiple files
discoveries.lesson: Build memory discipline + structured logging immediately

discoveries.title: RAPID Creatives Must Strictly Follow Brand Identity
discoveries.description: While creating 10 image ad briefs, realized first draft ignored RAPID's distinctive brand identity (black/white/light blue colors, checkerboard pattern, all-caps sans-serif headlines, modern/direct aesthetic). Rewrite ensured every brief explicitly called out brand requirements.
discoveries.implication: Creative consistency is critical for new brand recognition. Brand enforcement must be built into creative process from start.
discoveries.lesson: Brand guidelines > creative freedom for new products
discoveries.action: Created NANO_BANANA_IMAGE_BRIEFS.md (revised) with strict RAPID brand enforcement

blockers.title: Ad Campaigns Created But No Ads Attached Yet
blockers.description: RAPID_PROSPECTING, RAPID_RETARGETING, and RAPID_TESTING_LOOKALIKE campaigns are created and paused, but no individual ads have been created or attached. All 13 ad sets are empty.
blockers.root_cause: Waiting for image creatives from Nano Banana 2
blockers.blocker: Lachlan (creating image briefs + coordinating creative generation)
blockers.resolution_path: 1. Generate 10 image concepts with Nano Banana 2, 2. Create individual ad creatives in Meta Ads Manager, 3. Attach to corresponding ad sets, 4. Launch campaigns

blockers.title: RAPID Pixel Not Configured - No Conversion Tracking Yet
blockers.description: Pixel ID exists but conversion tracking not configured on ad creatives. Can't test pixel firing without actual ads running.
blockers.root_cause: Ads not created yet (circular dependency with blocker above)
blockers.blocker: Creatives needed before pixel can be configured
blockers.resolution_path: Once ads created: 1. Add conversion specs to ads, 2. Test with test traffic, 3. Verify pixel firing in GA4, 4. Monitor during launch

blockers.title: No Automatic Session Context Loading
blockers.description: Each session starts blank. No automatic recall of previous session work, no loading of relevant project context at startup. Led to 'forgot RAPID work' incident.
blockers.root_cause: No structured logging system yet; memory is scattered
blockers.resolution_path: 1. Build JARVIS_LOG.json (this week), 2. Implement session init flow (Week 2), 3. Test context suggestions, 4. Deploy

milestones.title: Ad Campaigns Live with First Image Creatives
milestones.risk: Image generation delays could push to May 22

rapid_to_grand_tour.description: RAPID must be live before Grand Tour sellers can list products
rapid_to_grand_tour.impact: Grand Tour launch blocked until RAPID production-ready

rapid_to_blanks.description: RAPID's targeting learnings could improve BLANKS ad copy and targeting
rapid_to_blanks.impact: Share weekly insights from RAPID testing to BLANKS optimization

jarvis_to_all_projects.description: JARVIS memory foundation enables better coordination of all projects
jarvis_to_all_projects.impact: Once Phase 1 complete, can proactively surface cross-project insights

queries.instructions: Use these query patterns to extract insights from structured log

example_queries.name: What's blocking RAPID right now?
example_queries.implementation: SELECT * FROM blockers WHERE project='rapid' AND status != 'RESOLVED'

example_queries.name: What decisions have we made about Meta ads?
example_queries.implementation: SELECT * FROM decisions WHERE title CONTAINS 'Meta' OR title CONTAINS 'targeting' ORDER BY date DESC

example_queries.name: What have we learned that affects multiple projects?
example_queries.implementation: SELECT * FROM discoveries WHERE significance='HIGH' OR significance='CRITICAL'

example_queries.name: Which assets are critical to RAPID?
example_queries.implementation: SELECT * FROM assets WHERE projects CONTAINS 'rapid' AND critical=true

example_queries.name: What's the next milestone for RAPID?
example_queries.implementation: SELECT * FROM milestones WHERE project='rapid' AND status != 'COMPLETED' LIMIT 1
